name: Ang Babae Sa Likod Ng Face Mask
original_name: Ang Babae Sa Likod Ng Face Mask
overview: Malta, a 25-year-old cashier works hard to support her mother, Madam Baby. One day at work, Malta meets the handsome but unlucky in love Sieg. It’s love at first sight for Sieg, who is mesmerized by Malta’s eyes. What unfolds is the story of how Malta and Sieg find love and overcome their doubts and insecurities, and break the negative cycles of their past.

trailers.title: Ang Babae Sa Likod Ng Face Mask | Official Trailer
